procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1068
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1068 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1068 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1068'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1068 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Possible Coin Miner CPU Priority Param

osquery.name: t1068_suid
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

osquery.name: t1068_proc_priv
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, gid FROM processes WHERE uid = 0 AND parent != 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Possible Coin Miner CPU Priority Param

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation: 11 reproducible real sandbox runs across ≥3 executions, 8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 2 osquery correlations, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
